Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-25 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data reveals two exceptionally strong long-term performers at the top of the ranking. LINC (rank #1, score 95.1) shows extraordinary consistency across all timeframes, with 1,425% returns over 10 years and crushing SPY by 1,202 percentage points over that same period—while maintaining all four moving average supports (SMA 30/50/100/200). ISSC (rank #2) demonstrates even more aggressive short-to-medium term acceleration, with a 3-month-to-1-month ratio of 10.67x and 1-year returns of 278%, though it lacks the SMA30 support that LINC maintains and shows some deterioration in longer-term relative strength versus SPY at the 5-year mark (228 basis points vs 263 at 1-year). Both stocks pass 4 of 4 momentum ratio thresholds and significantly outperform the QQQ and gold (IAU), suggesting this is a broad equity strength pattern rather than narrow tech or commodity play. The "strong_buy" flag on LINC combined with its "clean" momentum signal and "confirmed" volatility profile indicates the dashboard's systematic filters are aligned on at least the top candidate, while ISSC's missing SMA30 cross introduces a minor

Click column headers to sort  |  Score = percentile composite: returns + ratio passes + bad-SPY resilience  |  SMA ✓ = price above all SMAs (30/50/100/200)  |  Ratio = short-term momentum consistency (out of 5 tests)  |  M = momentum signal (sortable) —  ● clean  ● stalling  ● overextended  |  V = volume confirmation (sortable) —  ● confirmed  ● normal  ○ thin  |  PB = entry timing: down day on strong stock (sortable by 1d return) —  ● buy today  ○ none  |  OL = theme overlap vs owned tickers —  ● overlap  ○ clear
